text: 3229 - رُوِيَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنْ حَكَمَ فِي دِرْهَمَيْنِ فَأَخْطَأَ كَفَرَ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3229 - It is narrated from Abu Basir that Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad Al-Baqir (as) said:
"Whoever judges in a matter of two dirhams and errs has disbelieved."
